questions.question: Which restaurants in San Diego Ca are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Restaurants in San Diego Ca with weekend hours include: McDonald's (Sat: 05:00-24:00), Domino's (Sat: 10:00-01:00), Carl's Jr. (Sat: 06:00-23:00), Jack in the Box (Sat: 00:00 - 24:00), Subway (Sat: 09:00-20:00), Burger King (Sat: 07:00-20:00), Filippi’s Pizza Grotto Chula Vista (Sat: 11:00-21:00), Domino's (Sat: 10:00-01:00) and 867 more. 875 total with weekend availability.
